technicalSEO.title: Custom Photo Magnets - Your Photos on Magnets | Banners.com
technicalSEO.metaDescription: Create custom photo magnets to showcase memories, promote your brand, or give as personalized gifts. High-quality, durable, and easy to customize online.

H3: How long do photo magnets last? ================================================== PRODUCT HEADER ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Custom Photo Magnets for Refrigerators, Promotional Displays & Business Use

Durable 30 Mil Magnetic Material for Indoor & Outdoor Photo Magnet Applications

PASTE INTO: Product Title / Subtitle Section -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== CONFIGURATOR LABELS ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW Custom Photo Magnet Size Options Photo Magnet Material Selection Cut & Finishing Options Production Turnaround Time Upload Your Photo or Design PASTE INTO: Configurator Labels -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== PRODUCT OVERVIEW TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Custom Photo Magnet Material for Refrigerator & Promotional Display Use

Transform your favorite photos into durable custom magnets perfect for refrigerators, business promotions, and marketing displays. Our photo magnets are printed on high-quality 30 mil magnetic material with included lamination for long-lasting indoor and outdoor use.

Photo Magnet Specifications:

  • 30 mil magnetic material for strong adhesion
  • Lamination included for weather resistance
  • Maximum print size up to 24" x 24"
  • Full-color printing for vibrant photo reproduction
  • Suitable for refrigerators, filing cabinets, and magnetic surfaces

Important Note: Before purchasing photo magnets, ensure your intended surface is magnetic receptive. Magnets will not adhere to aluminum or plastic vehicle body panels.

PASTE INTO: Product Overview Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== MATERIAL OPTIONS TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Photo Magnet Finishing & Cut Options for Professional Applications

Choose from multiple finishing options to customize your photo magnets for specific applications and mounting requirements.

Standard Photo Magnet Cut Options

Rounded Corners (Recommended): Our standard finishing option provides better airflow over your photo magnet and reduces the chances of lifting or removal in outdoor applications.

Square Cut: Clean, professional edges ideal for business applications and promotional displays.

Contour Cut: Custom die-cutting available for unique shapes that match your photo or design elements.

The rounded corner option is recommended for photo magnets that will be used on vehicles or in high-wind outdoor environments, as it provides superior adhesion and longevity.

PASTE INTO: Material Options Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== FINISHING OPTIONS TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Photo Magnet Artwork Requirements for High-Quality Printing

Recommended File Formats

Vector-based file types will produce the highest quality results for your photo magnets, such as .eps files with fonts converted to outlines. We can also print high-resolution .pdf or .jpg files for excellent photo reproduction.

Photo Quality Guidelines

For best results, submit high-resolution photos with at least 150 DPI at the final print size. If you're unsure about your file quality, our professional graphic designers will review your artwork and provide recommendations.

Artwork Proofing Options

Order Proofs: Request a proof to double-check your photo magnet design, pricing, and order information before production begins. Your proof will include a low-resolution preview of your artwork and complete order summary.

Color Match Proof System: For color-critical photo magnet projects, our Color Match Proof System ensures accurate color reproduction. Contact customer service for details on this premium proofing option.

PASTE INTO: Finishing Options Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== PRODUCTION TIMES TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Custom Photo Magnet Production & Turnaround Times

Choose from flexible production timeframes ranging from one to five business days to meet your photo magnet delivery requirements.

Available Production Options

1 Business Day Priority: Fast turnaround for urgent photo magnet orders. Orders approved after 5:00 PM CST will be processed the following business day. Emergency same-day rushes available in some cases.

2 Business Days Express: Quick production for time-sensitive photo magnet projects while maintaining quality standards.

3 Business Days Standard: Our most popular turnaround option offering the best balance of speed and value for photo magnet orders.

5 Business Days Saver: Cost-effective option for non-urgent photo magnet projects with advance planning.

Production Notes: Turnaround time begins when file upload is complete. Orders flagged in prepress or requiring proof approval will begin production once approval is received. Total delivery time includes both production and shipping time.

PASTE INTO: Production Times Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== PAYMENT OPTIONS TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Photo Magnet Payment & Ordering Options

All custom photo magnets must be paid for prior to production to ensure prompt processing and delivery.

Accepted Payment Methods

  • Visa, MasterCard, American Express, and Discover credit cards
  • Business and personal checks (must be received before production begins)
  • Secure online payment processing

Payment Processing

Your credit card will not be charged until you have approved your photo magnet order and artwork. This ensures you have complete control over your purchase before production begins.

For check payments, orders will be held until payment is received and processed. Contact customer service for specific check payment guidelines and processing times.

PASTE INTO: Payment Options Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== SHIPPING GUIDELINES TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Shipping Options for Custom Photo Magnet Delivery

We provide reliable shipping options to ensure your custom photo magnets arrive safely and on time.

Standard Shipping Information

Unless otherwise specified, photo magnet orders ship via UPS Ground with 1-3 day delivery to 90% of the United States. You will receive tracking information once your package ships.

Shipping Guidelines

  • Shipping costs determined by package weight and destination
  • Additional charges apply to oversized photo magnet orders
  • Tracking numbers provided for all shipments
  • Expedited shipping options available upon request

Shipping Terms

Once photo magnets have shipped, all shipping company terms and conditions apply. Damaged goods must be returned for replacement. Lost packages will be replaced after shipping company investigation is complete.

For specific shipping questions, contact customer service at (320) 391-5300 prior to placing your photo magnet order.

PASTE INTO: Shipping Guidelines Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== COMMON USES TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Business & Personal Uses for Custom Photo Magnets

Custom photo magnets offer versatile applications for both business marketing and personal display needs.

Business Applications

  • Promotional giveaways featuring company photos or products
  • Real estate agent marketing with property photos
  • Restaurant menu items or food photography displays
  • Trade show handouts and booth displays
  • Corporate event photography and branding
  • Professional service reminders and contact information

Personal Uses

  • Family photos for refrigerator display
  • Wedding and anniversary photo keepsakes
  • Graduation and milestone celebration memories
  • Pet photos and memorial tributes
  • Vacation and travel photography
  • Holiday and seasonal photo displays

Ideal Surfaces

Photo magnets work best on refrigerators, filing cabinets, magnetic whiteboards, metal doors, and other ferrous metal surfaces. Test magnetic attraction before ordering for vehicle applications.

PASTE INTO: Common Uses Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== ARTWORK TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Design Services for Custom Photo Magnet Creation

Upload Your Own Photos

Step 1: Choose your photo magnet product and desired size from our available options.

Step 2: Upload your high-resolution photo or design file directly from your computer.

Our system accepts various file formats including JPG, PNG, PDF, and EPS for optimal photo magnet printing results.

Professional Design Services

Step 1: Select your photo magnet specifications and size requirements.

Step 2: Upload your photo and any additional design elements you want included.

Step 3: Provide detailed instructions for our designers including text placement, color preferences, and any special design requirements for your photo magnet project.

Our experienced graphic design team will create professional layouts that maximize the impact of your photos while ensuring optimal print quality for magnet applications.

PASTE INTO: Artwork Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== POST-TAB CONTENT ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Order Custom Photo Magnets for Business & Personal Use

Ready to transform your favorite photos into durable, professional-quality magnets? Our custom photo magnets combine high-resolution printing with strong 30 mil magnetic material to create lasting promotional tools and personal keepsakes.

Whether you need photo magnets for business marketing, family memories, or special events, our flexible production times and professional printing ensure your project meets your exact specifications.

Get started with your custom photo magnet order:

  • Choose your size and quantity requirements
  • Upload your high-resolution photos or design files
  • Select your preferred production timeline
  • Review and approve your order for production

Questions about photo magnet specifications, artwork requirements, or shipping options? Contact our customer service team at (320) 391-5300 for personalized assistance with your order.

PASTE INTO: Post-Tab Content (Before FAQ) -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== FAQ ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Frequently Asked Questions

Can I use my own artwork or photos for my custom photo magnets?

Yes, you can upload your own photos and artwork for custom photo magnet printing. We accept high-resolution JPG, PNG, PDF, and EPS files. For best results, submit photos with at least 150 DPI at the final print size.

What material are your photo magnets made from?

Our photo magnets are printed on durable 30 mil magnetic material with included lamination for weather resistance. This material provides strong magnetic attraction while protecting your printed photos from moisture and UV exposure.

Do your photo magnets use photo paper?

No, we print directly onto magnetic material using professional digital printing processes. This creates a more durable product than traditional photo paper magnets, with better weather resistance and longer lifespan.

Can I choose different cut shapes for my photo magnets?

Yes, we offer rounded corners (recommended), square cut, and custom contour cutting options. Rounded corners provide better airflow and adhesion for outdoor use, while square cuts offer clean professional edges.

What surfaces do magnets stick to best?

Photo magnets work best on ferrous metal surfaces like refrigerators, filing cabinets, magnetic whiteboards, and steel doors. They will not stick to aluminum, plastic, or non-magnetic metal surfaces.

Can photo magnets get wet?

Yes, our photo magnets include lamination protection that makes them suitable for indoor and outdoor use. They can withstand moisture, light rain, and humidity without damage to the printed image.

Can I write on my magnet?

The laminated surface of our photo magnets is not designed for writing. If you need writable magnetic material, consider our dry erase magnets or contact customer service for custom options.

How long do photo magnets last?

With proper care and appropriate surface application, our photo magnets can last several years outdoors and indefinitely indoors. The lamination protection helps prevent fading and weather damage.

PASTE INTO: FAQ Tab --------------------------------------------------
